itinerary.title: Reykjavik
itinerary.description: Explore the colorful capital. Visit Hallgrimskirkja and enjoy the Blue Lagoon.

itinerary.title: Golden Circle & South Coast
itinerary.description: Gullfoss waterfall, Geysir, and the black sand beaches of Vik.

itinerary.title: Jökulsárlón & Glacier
itinerary.description: Glacier lagoon boat tour. Ice cave exploration and Northern Lights chase.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.description: Final soak in a natural hot spring before heading home.

title: Iceland: Fire & Ice
description: Chase the Northern Lights and explore volcanic landscapes. From geysers to glaciers, Iceland is nature at its most dramatic.
